title: Apply Punch-In Effects
description: Learn how to use the 16 real-time punch-in effects to add variation and excitement to your performance.

steps.title: Start Playback
steps.instruction: Press the play button to start your pattern playing. Make sure you have a beat or pattern with some content to hear the effects.
steps.tip: Effects work best with a rhythmic pattern playing so you can hear the transformations.

steps.title: Hold the FX Button
steps.instruction: Hold down the FX button. While holding it, you can trigger any of the 16 effects using the pads.
steps.tip: Keep holding FX throughout - releasing it doesn't activate effects, it just exits FX mode.

steps.title: Try Loop Effects (Pads 1-4)
steps.instruction: While holding FX, press and hold pad 1 for a tight stutter loop. Try pads 2, 3, and 4 for progressively longer loops. Release the pad to return to normal playback.

steps.title: Explore More Effects
steps.instruction: Continue holding FX and try other pads: pad 7 for scratch, pad 9-10 for filter sweeps, pad 12 for tape stop, pad 8 for reverse playback.
steps.tip: Each pad triggers a different effect. Experiment to find your favorites!

outcomes: Understanding of how punch-in effects work
Knowledge of the different effect types
